  • Package in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.model

    • Class in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.model.CompositeDescription extends Description implements Serializable

      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • conceptFsn

          java.lang.String conceptFsn
          Fully Specified Name of the Concept

        • conceptState

          java.lang.String conceptState
          It refers to the state of the Concept to which the particular description is associated

        • definitionStatus

          java.lang.String definitionStatus
          Definition status of the Concept to which the description is associated

        • hierarchy

          java.lang.String hierarchy
          Semantic Tag/ Hierarchy to which the description belongs

        • isPreferredTerm

          java.lang.String isPreferredTerm
          String value that describes whether the description is preferred term or not

        • refset

          Refset refset

        • refSetLangMember

          RefSetMember refSetLangMember
          RefSetMember to identify description is from UK or US

    • Class in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.model.Concept extends Component implements Serializable

      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • definitionStatusId

          EnumDefStatus definitionStatusId
          An identifier that tells whether the concept is fully Defined or primitive.

        • descriptions

          java.util.List<Description> descriptions
          All available descriptions of the this concept

        • fullySpecifiedName

          java.lang.String fullySpecifiedName
          A human readable name for the concept.

        • preferredName

          java.lang.String preferredName

        • semantictag

          java.lang.String semantictag
          The semantic tag type of this concept

    • Class in.cdac.medinfo.csnotk.csnolib.model.Description extends Component implements Serializable

      serialVersionUID:
      1L

      • Serialized Fields

        • caseSignificanceId

          EnumCaseSignificance caseSignificanceId
          caseSignificanceId represents the significance of case in the Description.

        • conceptId

          java.lang.String conceptId
          conceptId represents the concept Id of the concept associated with that particular description.

        • languageCode

          java.lang.String languageCode
          languageCode specifies the language used in the description text.

        • term

          java.lang.String term
          Represents the Description term.

        • typeId

          EnumDescType typeId
          typeId represents the id that specifies the description type.
